findings.title: SSE resource leak on WorkspaceProvider unmount
findings.issue: WorkspaceProvider did not stop SSE connections (useMultiSSE and activation SSE) on unmount, causing leaked EventSource connections when switching skills or navigating away.
findings.suggestion: Add cleanup useEffects calling sseStopAll() and activationSSE.stop() on unmount.
findings.impact: Leaked SSE connections accumulate, consuming browser resources and potentially causing stale event handling.
